verdict: Best mean decisions arm is high_21_25_cap96: 327931 (-19.35% vs inherited F422 baseline), but the mean is dominated by a large seed-2 drop to 267060 decisions. Cap32/cap64/cap96 are all positive without F343; F343 composition is consistently worse than pure high-cluster priority. Next gate: replicate pure high-cluster cap80/cap96/cap112 over more seeds.
